originalTitle: After years of teasing, the viral Nopia synth is ‘basically finished’
summary: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo brought it to the MusicRadar offices for an in-depth first look and revealed that it will be launching […]
content: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. The duo brought it to the MusicRadar offices for an in-depth first look and revealed that it will be launching in “a couple of months” for around £550. Nopia is built around harmonic interplay in a unique way. Rather than a few knobs and a keyboard controlling a single synth patch, it blends multiple modules — keys, bass, arp, and pad — into a single performance, not unlike a drumless groovebox. There’s a one-octave keyboard called the Chord Builder, a 12-button Tonal Selector, and an Extensions Dial that dictate the key and voicing of the chords. The idea is to let you play complex harmonies with just a finger or two. Additional performance features include a strum plate in the top-right corner for plucking specific notes from a chord and a slider for full chord pitch bends. In addition to the virtual analog and sample-based synth engines, there are basic effects like delay, reverb, tape emulation, and beat repeat, as well as a ton of connectivity options, including per-module MIDI output for controlling other instruments with Nopia’s harmonic engine. [Media: https://youtu.be/7BShkL0rAxY]
chineseTitle: 经过多年的戏弄，病毒式的 Nopia 合成器已经“基本完成”
chineseSummary: 2023 年，Nopia 首次亮相，引起了互联网音乐装备界的关注，之后，创作者 Martin Grieco 和 Rocío Gal 几乎准备将其推向市场。两人将其带到 MusicRadar 办公室进行了深入的初步了解，并透露它将推出 [...]
chineseContent: 2023 年，Nopia 首次亮相，引起了互联网音乐装备界的关注，之后，创作者 Martin Grieco 和 Rocío Gal 几乎准备将其推向市场。两人将其带到 MusicRadar 办公室进行了深入的初步了解，并透露它将在“几个月”内以 550 英镑左右的价格推出。 Nopia 以独特的方式围绕谐波相互作用构建。它不是用几个旋钮和一个键盘来控制单个合成器音色，而是将多个模块（琴键、贝斯、琶音和打击垫）混合到一个演奏中，与无鼓的groovebox没有什么不同。有一个称为和弦生成器的一个八度键盘、一个 12 按钮音调选择器以及一个用于指定和弦调和发声的扩展转盘。这个想法是让你只用一两个手指就能演奏复杂的和声。其他性能功能包括右上角的弹拨板，用于从和弦中拨动特定音符，以及用于全和弦弯音的滑块。除了虚拟模拟和基于样本的合成引擎之外，还有延迟、混响、磁带模拟和节拍重复等基本效果，以及大量连接选项，包括用于使用 Nopia 谐波引擎控制其他乐器的每个模块 MIDI 输出。 [媒体：https://youtu.be/7BShkL0rAxY]
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
